title: kaori.pipeline.analysis.complete
description: Fired by ai-orchestrator runner after every analysis_run finishes (success or fail). Producer: services/ai-orchestrator/analytics/runner.py:80.

analysis_run_id.description: analysis_runs.id — UUID. Distinguishes multiple analyses on the same pipeline_run.

status.description: Final terminal status of the analysis_run. 'partial' = some templates succeeded, others failed.

templates.description: List of template ids that ran (regardless of per-template success). Surfaced for the dashboard run-history feed.
